questions.question: What federal agency issues the variance required for laser light shows in Georgia?
questions.explanation: The FDA issues variances for laser light shows under 21 CFR 1040.11. Georgia follows federal guidelines for laser light show operations.

questions.question: Which form must be completed for outdoor unterminated laser shows?
questions.explanation: FAA Form 7140 (Notice of Proposed Outdoor Operations) must be completed for outdoor unterminated laser shows.

questions.question: What is the email address for submitting FDA laser product reports?
questions.explanation: Laser product reports and accidental occurrence reports can be submitted via email to RadHealthCustomerService@fda.hhs.gov.

questions.question: What FAA Service Area email should be used for laser show notifications in Georgia?
questions.explanation: Georgia is in the Eastern Service Area, so notifications should be sent to 9-ATO-ESA-OSG-Lasers-Searchlights@faa.gov.

questions.question: What is the reporting period for the FDA Annual Report?
questions.explanation: The Annual Report covers laser activity from July 1 to June 30 each year. Filing this report auto-renews a basic variance.

questions.question: Georgia has state-specific laser registration requirements separate from federal requirements.
questions.explanation: False. Georgia follows federal regulations. The Georgia document primarily references federal forms and other states with specific requirements.

questions.question: Which document describes all safety hazards and recommended mitigation for laser shows?
options: Health and Safety Report with Risk Assessment
questions.explanation: The Health and Safety Report includes Risk Assessment describing all safety hazards, show information, laser descriptions, diagrams, proof of training, and insurance certificates.

questions.question: Which cities require special fire/rescue coordination for laser shows?
questions.explanation: New York City requires permits for Theatrical Fog/Haze plus Certificate of Fitness. Orlando/Orange County Fire also requires coordination.

questions.question: What must be recorded on the Sample Operation Log Sheet?
questions.explanation: The Sample Operation Log Sheet is used to record that Standard Operating Procedures (SOP) were followed during laser operations.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a standard record-keeping form for laser operations?
options: Quality Control Safety Checklist - Single Page
questions.explanation: Annual Financial Statement is not a laser safety record-keeping form. The other options are all standard forms for documenting laser safety procedures.
